pressure_test.title: Dive to 40+ blocks below sea level and observe Pressure damage kicking in

air_pocket.title: Create an air pocket at depth to reset the Pressure counter during a deep dive

subtitle.text: Depth is a resource. Know how much you have.

description: The Pressure mod adds depth-based damage.
Damage increases with depth below the nearest air block above you.
An air pocket — even 3 blocks directly above — resets the counter.
Armor shifts when damage begins. It doesn't negate it at extreme depth.
Netherite players are not immune. The math still applies.
Managing pressure means managing air pockets.
Break a hole in the cave ceiling. Build a pocket.
This system pairs with Alex's Caves deep biomes
and the Abyssal descent toward ancient cities.
→ Dive deep enough to observe Pressure damage [check]
→ Create an air pocket to reset the counter [check]
→ Brew 4 Water Breathing potions (Pufferfish + Water Bottle)
